title: Bagley Viewpoint - Parks - Seattle.gov
content: Bagley Viewpoint is one of our many fine viewpoints that overlook the SR 520 floating bridge, Lake Washington, Bellevue, and beyond.

title: Bagley Viewpoint - Friends of Seattle's Olmsted Parks

title: Mt. Baker Ridge Viewpoint, Seattle, WA - Wanderlog

title: Best Seattle Viewpoints you don't want to miss! The Ultimate City ...
content: ## Best Seattle Viewpoints you don’t want to miss! I’ve been meaning to make a guide for Seattle for WAY too long. I lived there for 3 years and it was one of the best times of my life. This has allowed me to experience Seattle as both a resident and as a tourist. Kerry Park is one of my favorite viewpoints in Seattle. You get a fantastic view of downtown Seattle, the Space Needle, and if you’re lucky – Mount Rainier. I walked here when staying in Queen Anne and there’s a series of steps to get up to the top viewpoint that definitely gave me a workout! **Crowd Rating:** On the weekends this place can get pretty crowded, especially if the weather is nice and the mountain is out. It is right at the edge of a neighborhood and you would have to get pretty lucky to snag a spot nearby.

title: HAMILTON VIEWPOINT PARK - Updated June 2026 - Yelp
content: Great place to get a view of the Seattle skyline at night with the reflection off the water. Easy parking, really dark, but felt pretty safe as a solo tourist.
